_comment: Default spawn gate entity lists for the Civil mod.
Add or override JSON files under data/<namespace>/civil_spawn_gate_entities/.
whitelist — entity types that get an allow pass before zone-based rules
blacklist — entity types that also go through the same natural-spawn
civilization gate as hostile mobs. This is NOT a deny-spawn list.
If the same entity id appears in both lists, whitelist wins.
Files load in lexicographic order; later files add to the merged sets.
Set replace: true on a file to clear all entries loaded from earlier files,
then apply that file (same idea as civil_blocks).
Unknown entity ids are skipped with a warning.
